ecb.description: AT TIME OF INSPECTION, SPOKE TO UNIDENTIFIED WORKER WHO DENIED ACCESS. UNPERMITTED CONSTRUCTION WORK WAS NOTICED. ILLEGAL FRAMED ROUGHING WALL BUILT. STACK OF LUMBER APPEARS TO BE RESTING ON 1ST FLOOR. EXPOSED

AT TIME OF INSPECTION, OF 2 FAMILY DWELLING BUILDING, OBSERVED ACTIVE CONSTRUCTION TAKING PLACE. KNOCKED ON THE DOOR AND SPOKE WITH AN UNIDENTIFIED WORKER WHO DENIED ACCESS INTO THE BUILDING. NOTICE TRASH BAGS,

AT TIME OF INSPECTION, OBSERVED ELECTRICAL WIRING CUT AND REMOVED THROUGHOUT THE PROPERTY. NO GENERAL WIRING PERMIT WAS FILED FOR SCOPE OF WORK. ECB ISSUED AS UNSAFE CONDITIONS POSES ELECTRICAL HAZARD FOR UNPER

AT TIME OF INSPECTION, OBSERVED NEW/DEMOLITION/CAPPING OF PLUMBING FIXTURES AND PIPING FOR WATER AND GAS THROUGHOUT THE BUILDING. ECB ISSUED AS CONDITIONS POSES A SEVERE SAFETY HAZARD DUE TO UNDOCUMENTED/UNPERM

OBSERVED SEVERAL FIELD CONDITIONS NOT MATCHING APPROVED PLANS. FOLLOWING NOTICED: SISTERED BEAMS AT CELLAR, 1ST, 2ND, AND 3RD. LAYOUT NOT MATCHING AT BASEMENT. UNDOCUMENTED DEMO OF CHIMNEY AT 1ST FLOOR. 3RD FLO
